combined_text: Xenoblade Chronicles X is 22.7GB "Xenoblade Chronicles X is 22.7GBPosted on February 6, 2015 by Brian ( @NE_Brian ) in News, Wii UXenoblade Chronicles X may ultimately end up as the Wii U’s largest game. Via a listing on the e Shop, it’s confirmed that the game takes up 22.7GB of space to download. Source Share this: Twitter Facebo
